lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It has been well-maintained and shows only minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major mechanical systems are operational and the car runs well.
Good condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are fully operational.

Get ready for a dependable ride that’s ready for its next adventure! This car is a solid choice for anyone needing reliable transportation on a budget. It definitely shows its age with some visible wear and tear inside and out, but it still runs strong and gets you where you need to go. A great value for the price!

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior finish is flawless, with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks, and the interior looks and feels brand new with no signs of wear on the upholstery or dashboard. Mechanically, it is in perfect working order, featuring a complete service history and all original equipment. This is a rare, factory-fresh example that will satisfy even the most discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition and has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining its original deep luster without any chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery and trim show zero signs of wear, and all electronic features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, with a smooth-running engine and a comprehensive service history that proves its exceptional upkeep. For a buyer seeking a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line, this is an unparalleled choice.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled distinction. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with meticulous attention to detail. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a standard of care reserved for the most discerning collectors. An acquisition for those who demand excellence without compromise.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered and garage-kept, so it looks and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a pristine example of the E46 chassis, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This unit boasts a flawlessly maintained VANOS system and reinforced subframe mounting points. The powertrain delivers linear torque through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. Suspension geometry remains factory-spec with fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring optimal kinematics. This collector-grade specimen exhibits zero mechanical lash and an immaculate undercarriage, representing the pinnacle of high-revving atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents. Maintenance up to date. Ready for inspection.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in absolute showroom condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with a professional-grade ceramic coating, entirely free of imperfections, stone chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and unmarked, and the interior retains its original new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, presenting in an immaculate state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. Every surface and mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our stringent criteria for quality. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection, this offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards and preserved in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting a level of care that borders on the obsessive. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, every detail confirms its status as a premier example of the marque. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly investment-grade asset.

Hey everyone! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream! I’ve babied this car since day one—it’s been garage-kept, meticulously detailed, and looks just as stunning as the day I first saw it. If you’re looking for a ride that’s in absolutely pristine shape and drives like a total dream, this is the one for you. You really have to see it in person to believe how well it's been cared for!

Offering a concours-level specimen featuring a high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a recently serviced dual-VANOS system. This example boasts a Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The chassis has undergone preventative rear subframe reinforcement and retains its original suspension geometry with refreshed bushings for razor-sharp turn-in. Finished in a mirror-like factory coat, the engine bay is clinically clean, showing no signs of thermal cycling wear or fluid weeping. A mechanically flawless, turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. No accidents. Price is $45,000.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish in its original factory paint, entirely free from swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, reflecting a history of meticulous care. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows zero signs of wear, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. All technological features, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist systems, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been maintained strictly by authorized specialists with a comprehensive service file included. It has been exclusively garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of pristine engineering.

We are proud to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained to a standard that defines the upper echelon of the pre-owned market. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, exhibiting meticulous care and an uncompromising commitment to mechanical and aesthetic excellence. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a showroom-quality acquisition without compromise.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in showroom condition with no discernible wear. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, catering to the most discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I'm so excited to show you this absolute beauty. It’s been my pride and joy and is in truly spectacular shape—honestly, it looks and feels just like it did the day it left the showroom! It’s been meticulously cared for, drives like a dream, and is ready for its next adventure. You really have to see it in person to believe how pristine it is. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage stored. Full service history. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since new. The exterior finish is deep and mirror-like, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, highlighting the flawless body lines. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory fragrance; the premium leather upholstery shows no creasing or wear, and every tactile surface—from the steering wheel to the switchgear—feels crisp and new. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. From the pristine engine bay to the spotless undercarriage, this is a collector-grade specimen that satisfies even the most discerning eye. No modifications, no blemishes, and no compromises—this is as close to a new vehicle as you can find on the pre-owned market.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. This example has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire an investment-quality automobile that defines the pinnacle of its class.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, which remains in a state of absolute preservation. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster, devoid of any discernible wear. Rigorously maintained and mechanically peerless, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its initial delivery. For the discerning client who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection, this offering stands as a definitive acquisition.

Hey everyone! 👋 Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. This car is in total mint condition—honestly, it still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this beauty since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's been impeccably loved and kept in pristine shape, this is the one for you. Can't wait for it to find a great new home!

Offering a collector-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine, delivering 333 hp with surgical precision via six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. This example retains its factory-spec Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission, providing crisp, mechanical engagement. The chassis is structurally immaculate, featuring documented subframe reinforcement and a variable M-differential lock for superior lateral traction. Suspension geometry remains tight with aluminum control arms and multi-link rear architecture, ensuring the visceral feedback and cornering poise expected of a pristine E46. A turn-key investment for the purist seeking uncompromised performance and mechanical integrity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No accidents. Interior is flawless. Mechanically perfect.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless deep-gloss finish and pristine body lines without a single stone chip or swirl mark. The interior remains in 'as-new' condition, featuring supple, uncreased premium leather, high-definition displays still crisp to the touch, and that unmistakable factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, with full documentation provided. From the whisper-quiet idle to the responsive, tight suspension, this car drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly immaculate, investment-grade specimen.

Presented here is an investment-grade vehicle maintained to the highest standards of excellence. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a legacy of fastidious ownership. Mechanically sound and aesthetically flawless, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector.
